title: Honey Dijon Announces New Album NightLife: Hear “Just Friends”
author: Tom Breihan
summary:
Over the last few years, the veteran house producer Honey Dijon has collaborated with people like Beyoncé and Jamie xx. In January, she released the single “Slight Werk” with Bree Runway. Last week, she announced the impending release of NightLife, a new club-centric album that’ll feature collaborations with people like Rochelle Jordan, Chlöe, Madison McFerrin,…

The post Honey Dijon Announces New Album <em>NightLife</em>: Hear “Just Friends” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Over the last few years, the veteran house producer Honey Dijon has collaborated with people like Beyoncé and Jamie xx. In January, she released the single "Slight Werk" with Bree Runway. Last week, she announced the impending release of NightLife, a new club-centric album that'll feature collaborations with people like Rochelle Jordan, Chlöe, Madison McFerrin, and Greentea Peng. Today, she shares her new single "Just Friends." 

"Just Friends" is straight-up classic-style euphoric disco-house, the kind of thing that could've lit up the world's most glamorous dancefloor in 1994. Singers Adi Oasis and Danielle Ponder add soaring gospel-style vocals, while Atlanta rapper Suni MF drops in with a verse. Below, check out "Just Friends" and the NightLife tracklist.

TRACKLIST:
01 "The Nightlife" (feat. Chlöe)
02 "Slight Werk" (feat. Bree Runway)
03 "Just Friends" (feat. Adi Oasis, Danielle Ponder, & Suni MF)
04 "International" (feat. METTE)
05 "I Like It Hot" (feat. Greentea Peng)
06 "Private Eye" (feat. Rochelle Jordan)
07 "Smoke And Mirrors" (feat. Madison McFerrin)
08 "New Wave Groove" (feat. Rochelle Jordan)
09 Rush Me" (feat. Mahalia)
10 "Satisfied" (feat. Jacob Lusk)
11 "Welcome To The Moon" (feat. Cor.Ece & Dave Giles II)
12 "Okay Daddy" (feat. Rush Davis, Gavin Turek, & Cor.Ece)

NightLife is out 4/17 on SOS.
